notes: Clean pitch: concrete metrics, distinct propositions, no template echo.

propositions.text: We serve 1,200 paying customers in manufacturing QA.
ARR grew from $180k to $740k over the past twelve months.
Our closed-loop vision pipeline reduces defect escape by 38 percent.
Integration with PLC logs cuts factory onboarding to under seven days.
Therefore, we can reach $3M ARR within the next four quarters.
